headline: Occidental Petroleum Stock May Be at a Peak - Time to Sell OXY Covered Calls?
summary: Occidental Petroleum stock closed up 1.5% on Friday and has risen 23% since the end of February. Even if it's not a peak, it might make sense to sell OXY covered calls, given its high out-of-the-money call premiums.
